author: amecca
body:
in the All-in-One tool

#### PR description:
This modifies the defaults in the All-in-one TkAl validation tool to use generic CPE and not use the `pixelQualityFlag`. This conforms with the recent changes in production (https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50480, https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50616).

#### PR validation:
Ran `Alignment/OfflineValidation/test/testingScripts/validateAlignments.sh`, ran `runTheMatrix.py -l limited -i all --ibeos`.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:
This will be backported to a production IB, e.g. 16_1_X.

Before submitting your pull requests, make sure you followed this checklist:
- verify that the PR is really intended for the chosen branch
- verify that changes follow [CMS Naming, Coding, And Style Rules](http://cms-sw.github.io/cms_coding_rules.html)
- verify that the PR passes the basic test procedure suggested in the [CMSSW PR instructions](https://cms-sw.github.io/PRWorkflow.html)

title: [TkAl][validation] Default to generic CPE and usePixelQualityFlag=False
